title: cyperus neochinensis
intro: Cyperus neochinensis, also known as the Chinese flat sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Cyperus neochinensis has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus neochinensis include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Cyperus neochinensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
